Container.Name: SubSyncarr
Container.Overview: SubSyncarr fixes out-of-sync external subtitles AND downloads new subtitles for your movie and TV library. It connects to your Kodi, Plex, Emby, or Jellyfin library, lets you search by title with poster art, scans folders for subtitle files, downloads subtitles from 6 providers (OpenSubtitles.com, SubDL, Gestdown, YIFY, Podnapisi, Addic7ed), and uses ffsubsync to automatically align subtitle timing against the audio track. Download and sync in one click. Works with any language combination. Every sync creates a backup first. Supports batch TV season sync with a live progress queue. Designed to be used from your couch on a phone or tablet.
Container.Description: Fix out-of-sync subtitles AND download new ones from your couch. Connects to Kodi, Plex, Emby, or Jellyfin. Searches your library with poster art, detects embedded vs external subtitles, downloads subtitles from 6 providers, and uses ffsubsync to align timing against audio. Download and sync in one click. Works with any language. Backups created automatically. Batch TV season sync supported. Couch-friendly UI for phone and tablet.[br][br][b]Setup:[/b] After install, open the WebUI, select your media source, configure connection, click Detect Library Paths, then Scrape Library Now.[br][br][b]Media servers:[/b] Kodi (HTTP control), Plex (token auth), Emby (API key), Jellyfin (API key).[br][br][b]Subtitle providers:[/b] OpenSubtitles.com, SubDL, Gestdown, YIFY, Podnapisi, Addic7ed.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent config, database, and settings. Do not share with other containers.

Config.Name: Movies Folder
Config.Description: Your unRAID movies folder. Must match your media server movie source folder.

Config.Name: TV Shows Folder
Config.Description: Your unRAID TV shows folder. Must match your media server TV source folder.

Config.Name: Scrape Interval
Config.Description: How often to auto-scrape your media library for new content (in hours). Options: 6, 12, or 24.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Your timezone for correct timestamps. Examples: America/New_York, America/Chicago, America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Default 99 (nobody) works for most unRAID setups.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Default 100 (users) works for most unRAID setups.
